title: Happy Birthday, Emma-san!
detail_text: <:th_ch0201/>Emma-san, happy birthday!<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0203/>Congratulations on your birthday!<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0207/>Happy birthday!<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0208/>Thank you! I want to congratulate you all too. Congratulations on making it to day two of your live concert~!<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0201/>Ehehe, thank you so much!<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0203/>Did you enjoy day one of our performance?<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0208/>Of course~! I was totally captivated by the A・ZU・NA LAGOON!<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0207/>I’m glad you enjoyed it. When we’re on stage today, we’ll make eye contact with you!<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0208/>Whaaat!? Really!?<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0201/>We’ll celebrate you in the A・ZU・NA LAGOON!<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0203/>So don’t blink, or you’ll miss it! 𝅘𝅥𝅮<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0208/>Okay! 𝅘𝅥𝅮<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0000/>Translated by SIFAStheatre and Idol Story<:dt_line_end/>
